title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
summary: Tencent WorkBuddy is a desktop AI productivity agent that handles file reading, spreadsheet analysis, report generation, presentations, and remote task execution. It includes 100+ domain-specific expert agents, team collaboration modes, integrations with GitHub, Jira, Slack, Google Drive and others, and a skill marketplace for web search and document processing.
writeup: The video covers Tencent WorkBuddy, a desktop AI productivity agent that reads files, analyzes spreadsheets, generates reports and presentations, and executes tasks remotely. It matters because it bundles agentic workflow automation into a single desktop application aimed at office and team work rather than coding alone. Key takeaways: WorkBuddy ships with 100+ domain-specific expert agents and team collaboration modes; it integrates with GitHub, Jira, Slack, Google Drive, and others; and it offers a skill marketplace covering web search and document processing.
